title: Pride Mahjong
description: You have to find three identical tiles with food to destroy them. The tiles are placed on a special form where 7 tiles can be placed at the same time. The game also has three types of bonuses that can be used to make the game easier.
instructions: Match three of the same tiles Click on a tile to move it to the collection spots at the bottom If you have collected three of the same tiles there they will be removed
